restaurants.name: From Scratch-Authentic Italian Pizzeria
signature_dishes: Carbonara (made with organic eggs, prepared table-side)
restaurants.signature_dishes_confidence: Derived from repeated review mentions, not a scraped menu.

reviews.text: I wanted to gate-keep because this is a small place with only a few tables, but my goodness is this the best spot to eat in boston. Everything is made FROM SCRATCH, for real. The bread was like I was eating from europe. The pasta was like i ate it from italy. The meatballs??? DELICIOUS. The portions are HUGE and you definitely get your money's worth here and more. The desserts are AMAZING... The blueberry panacotta was SO tasty.

Wow! My dish had wonderful bold rich flavors that I couldn't get enough of and the dessert I would have eaten seconds and thirds. This place truly is from scratch... a local family place with lots of love and passion.
Superb really good food. Super fresh. The bread they serve for appetizers is absolutely delicious freshly made for each table when we walk in.
Great food and great service. Amazing place

What a wonderful family neighborhood spot. Unbelievable pizza and pasta made with love. They use organic eggs for their carbonara and she showed me the whole process as she made it. Don't hesitate for a second to come to this absolute gem.

restaurants.menu_data_note: Menu data unavailable this run; dish mentions extracted from review text instead.
restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Uniformly glowing reviews across five different visitors, repeatedly praising freshness, portion size, and the family-run atmosphere with zero negative signal.

My god how can I give this place more stars! ...the sauce is never bland and complex in flavor and spice! You want to impress newcomers? GET THE OLD FASHIONED! They come out to you with your drink inside of a lantern filled with smoke... this is a CLASSY place.

restaurants.name: The Dirty Italian

reviews.text: We order food from TDI once a month for our office staff meeting (12-15 sandwiches badda bing!). Our order is always perfectly executed and tastes amazing.
The eggplant parm had good flavor, but it fell short in a few areas. The biggest issue was the bread-to-eggplant ratio... It was also a bit dry, and there wasn't enough sauce.
Bought a small sub for $17.50 requested extra peppers and they charged me one dollar, no spice or oil at all.
I recently placed a small catering order for a family party and everything was perfect! ...everyone raved about the food.
They have delicious sandwiches, an assortment of pasta ready to go, and a small Italian grocery section. My son is a regular there.

restaurants.menu_data_note: Menu data unavailable this run; dish mentions extracted from review text instead.
restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Catering and sandwich orders are consistently praised, but there are real complaints about portion balance, dryness, and a minor billing gripe over extra peppers.

restaurants.name: Davio's Northern Italian Steakhouse
restaurants.address: BOS Terminal C, 1 Harborside Dr, Boston, MA 02128
signature_dishes: Pasta (reviewers frequently order this, though quality was inconsistent in this sample)
restaurants.signature_dishes_confidence: Derived from review mentions of this specific airport (Logan Terminal C) location, not Davio's flagship Newbury St restaurant.

reviews.text: Had a lengthy layover, so I chose to eat before my next flight... the first thing I noticed was a fly in the lettuce... The bill included an $8.88 tip on a $19 drink.
Pasta was undercooked, lower than al dente, and lacked flavors. Buffalo chicken spring rolls had no Buffalo flavor. For higher than airport food prices, expected better food quality.
The most basic pasta should not be over $30 and be tasteless but somehow it is. No salt. No pepper. Noodles way over boiled. The worst meal I think I've ever had
Nice place to kill a few hours with great cocktails and tasty food. Michelle is a great server.
Service was very good and TVs to watch World Cup football... Food looked a little plain and well over priced $21 for a plain pizza.

restaurants.menu_data_note: Menu data unavailable this run; dish mentions extracted from review text instead.
restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Three of five reviews report significant food-quality problems (undercooked pasta, blandness, a fly in the food) at airport prices; this sample reflects the Logan Airport outpost specifically, not Davio's main Boston location.
